# roadmapUpdate

Updates a roadmap.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`RoadmapPayload`](../objects/roadmap_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `input` | [`RoadmapUpdateInput`](../input-objects/roadmap_update_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | The properties of the roadmap to update. |


## Deprecation

Roadmaps are deprecated, use initiatives instead.
